title: The Bone-Box of Passenger 537
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A luggage handler at Heathrow finds a human finger bone in a diplomatic pouch from a country that no longer exists, triggering a cross-continental chase involving a defunct cold-war treaty and three people who should all be dead.
long_description: A luggage handler at Heathrow finds a human finger bone in a diplomatic pouch from a country that no longer exists, triggering a cross-continental chase involving a defunct cold-war treaty and three people who should all be dead.
